
---
title: "AXCESSR Data Validity"
author: "Tilabo Williamson"
date: "2026-04-23"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    code-tools: true
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

```{r echo=FALSE}
library(pacman)
p_load(magrittr, tidyverse, psych, dplyr, prettydoc, haven, janitor, readxl, writexl, stringr, here, purrr, tibble, ggplot2, kableExtra, e1071, mirt, corrplot, lavaan, scales, patchwork, ggupset)
```

# Background
